Example-English 1: J.K. Rowling is a famous author who wrote the Harry Potter books.
Example-Chinnese 1: J.K.羅琳是一位寫了哈利波特系列書籍的著名作家。
Example-English 2: I want to be a famous author and write stories for children.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我想要成為一位著名的作家，為孩子們寫故事。
Example-English 3: The famous author came to our school today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 那位著名作家今天來我們學校。

Antonym-Chinese 2:
stupid 笨的
slow 遲鈍
Example-English 1: Using a mirror to see around the corner was a very clever idea.
Example-Chinnese 1: 用鏡子看角落是一個非常聰明的主意。
Example-English 2: The scientist had a clever idea to fix the broken machine.
Example-Chinnese 2: 這位科學家有一個聰明的主意來修理壞掉的機器。
Example-English 3: She had a clever idea for our team game.
Example-Chinnese 3: 她對我們的團隊遊戲有一個聰明的主意。

Definition: in the middle of a time
Antonym-Chinese 2:
before 之前
after 之後
Example-English 1: You should not talk to your friends loudly during the class.
Example-Chinnese 1: 你不應該在上課期間大聲和朋友說話。
Example-English 2: The teacher asked us to take notes during the class.
Example-Chinnese 2: 老師要求我們在上課期間做筆記。
Example-English 3: Do not talk loudly during the class.
Example-Chinnese 3: 上課期間不要大聲說話。

Example-English 1: The teacher gave an apple to each student in the classroom.
Example-Chinnese 1: 老師給教室裡的每位學生一顆蘋果。
Example-English 2: Each student must finish their homework before going home.
Example-Chinnese 2: 每位學生必須在回家前完成他們的作業。
Example-English 3: Each student got an apple from the teacher.
Example-Chinnese 3: 每位學生從老師那裡得到一顆蘋果。

Example-English 1: Your drawing is good enough to win the art contest.
Example-Chinnese 1: 你的畫作夠好，可以贏得藝術比賽。
Example-English 2: I practiced hard, so my piano playing is good enough for the show.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我努力練習，所以我的鋼琴演奏對這場表演來說夠好了。
Example-English 3: This soup is not good enough for me.
Example-Chinnese 3: 這碗湯對我來說不夠好。

Example-English 1: We need to buy food and drinks to prepare for the birthday party.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我們需要買食物和飲料來為生日派對做準備。
Example-English 2: The students study hard to prepare for the big math test.
Example-Chinnese 2: 學生們努力讀書以為大型數學考試做準備。
Example-English 3: We must prepare for the camping trip.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我們必須為露營之旅做準備。

Example-English 1: The teacher will be pleased with your perfect test score.
Example-Chinnese 1: 老師會對你完美的考試成績感到滿意。
Example-English 2: My parents will be pleased with me if I clean my bedroom.
Example-Chinnese 2: 如果我打掃臥室，我的父母會對我感到滿意。
Example-English 3: The teacher will be pleased with my work today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 老師今天會對我的作業感到滿意。

Example-English 1: A cute rabbit will suddenly appear from the magician's hat.
Example-Chinnese 1: 一隻可愛的兔子會突然從魔術師的帽子裡出現。
Example-English 2: Dark clouds suddenly appear in the sky before it starts to rain.
Example-Chinnese 2: 下雨前，烏雲會突然在天空中出現。
Example-English 3: The rabbit will suddenly appear on stage.
Example-Chinnese 3: 兔子會突然出現在舞台上。

Definition: very good to eat; tastes really nice
Example-English 1: My grandmother cooked a delicious meal with steak and potatoes for us.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我祖母為我們煮了一頓有牛排和馬鈴薯的美味餐點。
Example-English 2: We went to a fancy restaurant to enjoy a delicious meal.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們去了一家高級餐廳享受一頓美味的餐點。
Example-English 3: Grandma made a delicious meal for us.
Example-Chinnese 3: 奶奶為我們做了一頓美味的餐點。

Definition: a large open place with grass
Example-English 1: The boys are running and kicking the ball on the green soccer field.
Example-Chinnese 1: 男孩們在綠色的足球場上奔跑踢球。
Example-English 2: We will have a big match at the school soccer field tomorrow.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們明天將在學校的足球場舉行一場大型比賽。
Example-English 3: The soccer field is wet after the rain.
Example-Chinnese 3: 大雨後足球場是濕的。

Definition: food you eat at one time
Example-English 1: Our family sits together at the dining table to have a meal every evening.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我們全家每天傍晚坐在餐桌旁一起用餐。
Example-English 2: It is important to wash your hands before you have a meal.
Example-Chinnese 2: 在用餐前洗手是很重要的。
Example-English 3: We will have a meal at the cafe today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我們今天會在咖啡館吃一餐。

Example-English 1: The queen wears a shiny silver ring on her left finger.
Example-Chinnese 1: 女王在左手手指上戴著一枚閃亮的銀色戒指。
Example-English 2: He bought a beautiful silver ring as a gift for his wife.
Example-Chinnese 2: 他買了一枚美麗的銀色戒指作為給妻子的禮物。
Example-English 3: She found a silver ring in the box.
Example-Chinnese 3: 她在盒子裡找到一枚銀戒指。

Example-English 1: Please throw the empty bottle into the recycling bin after drinking the juice.
Example-Chinnese 1: 喝完果汁後，請將空瓶子丟進資源回收桶。
Example-English 2: He filled the empty bottle with fresh water from the river.
Example-Chinnese 2: 他用河裡的新鮮水裝滿了空瓶子。
Example-English 3: There is nothing in this empty bottle.
Example-Chinnese 3: 這個空瓶子裡什麼都沒有。

Example-English 1: We cannot play baseball outside because of the heavy rain.
Example-Chinnese 1: 因為下大雨，我們不能在外面打棒球。
Example-English 2: The heavy rain caused a terrible flood in the small town.
Example-Chinnese 2: 這場大雨在小鎮引發了可怕的洪水。
Example-English 3: We need umbrellas in this heavy rain today.
Example-Chinnese 3: 今天這場大雨我們需要雨傘。

Example-English 1: I lost my keys and failed my test, so it was a horrible day.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我弄丟了鑰匙又考不及格，所以這是糟糕的一天。
Example-English 2: The bad weather and the traffic jam made it a horrible day.
Example-Chinnese 2: 壞天氣和塞車讓這成了糟糕的一天。
Example-English 3: Today was a horrible day at school.
Example-Chinnese 3: 今天是在學校糟糕的一天。

Example-English 1: I will drink apple juice instead of milk for breakfast.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我早餐將喝蘋果汁而不是牛奶。
Example-English 2: Let's play video games inside instead of going out in the rain.
Example-Chinnese 2: 我們在室內打電動吧，而不是冒雨出門。
Example-English 3: I read a book instead of watching TV.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我看書而不是看電視。

Definition: to go away so you cannot see it
Example-English 1: The shy cat will disappear quickly into the bushes when it sees a dog.
Example-Chinnese 1: 害羞的貓看到狗時會快速消失在灌木叢中。
Example-English 2: The snow will disappear quickly when the sun comes out.
Example-Chinnese 2: 太陽出來時，雪會快速消失。
Example-English 3: The bird will disappear quickly from the cage.
Example-Chinnese 3: 那隻鳥會從籠子裡快速消失。

Example-English 1: I want to be a brave police officer in the future.
Example-Chinnese 1: 我未來想要成為一名勇敢的警察。
Example-English 2: Flying cars might be everywhere in the future.
Example-Chinnese 2: 未來飛行汽車可能會無處不在。
Example-English 3: I want to be a doctor in the future.
Example-Chinnese 3: 我未來想成為一位醫生。

Definition: a trip from one place to another
Example-English 1: They packed a lot of food for the long journey across the desert.
Example-Chinnese 1: 他們為穿越沙漠的漫長旅程打包了很多食物。
Example-English 2: The train ride to the mountains is a very long journey.
Example-Chinnese 2: 搭火車去山裡的車程是一段非常漫長的旅程。
Example-English 3: He was tired after the long journey home.
Example-Chinnese 3: 長途旅行回家後，他覺得很累。

Example-English 1: The news journalist is interviewing the mayor for the evening TV show.
Example-Chinnese 1: 這位新聞記者正在為晚間電視節目採訪市長。
Example-English 2: She wants to be a news journalist and report stories around the world.
Example-Chinnese 2: 她想要成為一名新聞記者，報導世界各地的故事。
Example-English 3: The news journalist took photos of the fire.
Example-Chinnese 3: 那位新聞記者拍下了火災的照片。

Example-English 1: It is sunny now, so perhaps we can go to the beach this afternoon.
Example-Chinnese 1: 現在天氣晴朗，所以或許我們今天下午可以去海灘。
Example-English 2: Perhaps we can ask the teacher for help with this difficult math problem.
Example-Chinnese 2: 或許我們可以請老師幫忙解決這道困難的數學題。
Example-English 3: Perhaps we can play outside after lunch.
Example-Chinnese 3: 或許我們午餐後可以在外面玩。
